name: lazycortex
description: AI tooling plugins for Claude Code — skills, agents, and hooks

plugins.name: lazycortex-core
plugins.description: Core skills, agents, and runtime daemon for Claude Code (expert runtime + agent-model routing + settings management)

plugins.name: lazycortex-diagram
plugins.description: Format-agnostic diagram engine: /lazy-diagram.draw dispatcher + per-format writer agents (mermaid, ascii, more later). Picks kind and format from request context, ships exemplar templates plus an authoring contract, and bundles a fixture-based regression suite.

plugins.name: lazycortex-experts
plugins.description: Generic doc-producing experts (interpreter, designer, planner) plus a starter set of domain aspects (claude-plugin, game-dev, dotfiles). Building blocks — compose specialists in lazy.settings.json[experts] with one agent + one or more aspects.

plugins.name: lazycortex-observe
plugins.description: Ship lazycortex-core runtime metrics to a Prometheus-compatible observer (Grafana Alloy or OpenTelemetry Collector) — vendor-neutral, observer-server-blind, headless-portable.

plugins.name: lazycortex-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault bootstrap and configuration management for Claude Code

plugins.name: lazycortex-python
plugins.description: Python coding discipline as a plugin: shared rules + reference guidelines + chk/tst checkers + PostToolUse hook + docstring-writer/test-writer agents + canonical file template. Installs once per repo via /lazy-python.install.

plugins.name: lazycortex-specs
plugins.description: Specification and design skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: lazycortex-wiki
plugins.description: Maintains a curated, LLM-navigable semantic wiki over a markdown+code base — summaries, hierarchical topic tags, and glossed See-also links, kept in sync via git-watch and weekly full-scan routines.
